title: Outlined
description: Allows for more hitbox outline customization when you look at stuff!
body:
# Adds more hitbox outline features when you look at stuff!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Twf8rrSr/images/1280f18eea58b8d91911de2b2bfaa131f01c86f4.png)

# This mod adds more hitbox outline features, such as:
- Entity hitbox outlines
- Block and entity hitbox outline disabling
- Block and entity hitbox outline colour and transparency customization

**These features can be customized using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). _(Requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config))_**

_If you don't have either of the required mods for configuration, you can check inside the _```config```_ folder in your minecraft files for _```outlined.json```_ and configure the mod's settings from there._
